turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi there, I'm calling for my father. He's 72 and needs to see a neurologist. He's been having some memory issues.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. That's very thoughtful of you. We have Dr. Amit Goswami in neurology. He's quite experienced with geriatric patients. He's available Monday at 2 PM and Wednesday at 4 PM.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can I have your father's name and your contact number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: His name is Baldev Singh. My number is 9988776655.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Mr. Baldev Singh's appointment with Dr. Goswami is confirmed for this Monday at 2 PM. Please bring any previous neurological reports or prescriptions if available.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Will do. Is there anything we should note before the visit?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It helps to write down any specific incidents or changes in behaviour you've noticed — dates if possible — and bring a list of all current medications. This really helps Dr. Goswami give a thorough assessment.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wishing your father good health. See you Monday!
